# Rajat Mehra — Portfolio

> Frontend Engineer. Building scalable web applications with modern technologies and AI-driven workflows.

## About

Rajat Mehra is a Frontend Engineer who specializes in React, Next.js, and TypeScript. He builds open source tools, advocates for web accessibility, and ships AI-powered products.

- Site: https://rajatmehra.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/rajat-mehra05
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/rajat-mehra05
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/_rajat_mehra_
- Resume: https://rajatmehra.dev/rajatresume.pdf

## Projects

### Rundownly
A 4MB desktop app that summarizes YouTube videos with structured summaries and timestamps. Built with Tauri 2, Next.js 16, React 19, Rust, and Claude API.
- GitHub: https://github.com/rajat-mehra05/rundownly
- Live: https://rundownly.vercel.app

### YouTube Transcript API
JavaScript/TypeScript library for extracting YouTube transcripts. 1000+ weekly npm downloads. Supports JSON, plain text, SRT, and WebVTT output formats.
- GitHub: https://github.com/rajat-mehra05/youtube-transcript-api-js
- NPM: https://npmjs.com/package/youtube-transcript-api-js

### Website Highlight Saver
Chrome extension for highlighting and saving webpage text with AI-powered summaries.
- GitHub: https://github.com/rajat-mehra05/website-highlight-saver

### Chatflow Builder
Drag-and-drop chatbot flow builder with a node-based visual editor. Built with Next.js 14, React Flow, and TypeScript.
- GitHub: https://github.com/rajat-mehra05/chatflow-builder
- Live: https://chatflow-builder.vercel.app

### HackerPedia
Hacker News client with real-time feeds, infinite scroll, nested comments, and dark mode.
- GitHub: https://github.com/rajat-mehra05/hackerpedia
- Live: https://hackerpedia.vercel.app

## Work Experience

### Wednesday Solutions (Sep 2022 – Sep 2025)
Software Engineer. Migrated a Next.js marketplace from CSR to SSG, built component libraries with micro-frontends, integrated SDKs for real-time dashboards, and engineered AI-powered automation workflows.

### Crypto Owl (Feb 2022 – Apr 2022)
Software Engineer. Developed UI for crypto websites and built analytics dashboards, attracting 10K monthly users.

## Blog

- "Beyond Barriers: Building Truly Inclusive Web Experiences" — Web accessibility principles and practical implementation: https://rajatmehra.dev/blog/web-accessibility
- "High Order Functions and Arrays in JavaScript" — Advanced array methods: https://rajatmehra.dev/blog/javascript-array-methods-every-developer-should-know
- "bind(), call(), and apply() in JavaScript" — Context binding and function invocation: https://rajatmehra.dev/blog/javascript-bind-call-apply-methods
- "Understanding async/await" — Async patterns and promises: https://rajatmehra.dev/blog/understanding-async-await-javascript

## Tech Stack

This site is built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Contentlayer (MDX), and Framer Motion. Deployed on Vercel.
